title: DevOps Engineer heartbeat
summary: Filed honest Friday scorecard (zero shipped, zero started, no dry run), added Mon–Thu retrospective acknowledging missed Tuesday check-in, updated backlog status banner and RT-4 status; pinged COO and CTO.
contextSummary: The sprint's failure mode was plan → wait → plan more, caused by P1 stories having no named engineering owner and DevOps not escalating when nothing moved by mid-week. Next sprint opens with OB-2 pipeline dry run as a gating item.
